subject: [RFC PATCH] nfs: use nfsi->rwsem to protect traversal of the file lock list

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Provided background information on the patch and its purpose, referencing a previous conversation with Claude. Mentioned that the commit log was hard to parse and provided a summary from Claude.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: The patch proposes to use nfsi->rwsem for protecting traversal of the file lock list in NFS, addressing a use-after-free bug.
